50.reason: [Variable 'a' may be uninitialized if the input has no decimal point, leading to undefined behavior]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  If input has no decimal point (though problem says it does), 'a' remains 0, leading to wrong exponent; also, if decimal is at position 1, exponent becomes 0 which is correct, but logic assumes decimal exists
